summary: Added a compact Path Command Strip between Mission Scan and the route rail so each money path reads more like a playable command board with next move, gate, proof, owner, notes, and fast jumps.
changes: Added renderPathCommandStrip and pathCommandStripCells to expose route command state directly inside Path Map.
Added local jump buttons for route, proof cache, chapter archive, staging queue, and command deck.
Compressed the mobile Path Map with horizontal mission and command chips so the route rail appears on the first phone viewport.
Added a snapshot JSON guard to prevent the visual dashboard data file from being overwritten with a markdown report again.
Updated the Path Map docs and cache key for the new command-strip surface.

verification.pytest: 30 passed, 55 deselected with python -m pytest tests -q -k agent_company_atlas

next_visual_targets: Reduce the Chapter Archive into collapsible/virtualized level clusters so deep history stops creating massive page height.
Add richer sprite/avatar motion for bots inside each lane without increasing scroll length.
Turn each future lane module into a swappable mini-game shell with its own texture, soundless motion style, and proof trail rules.
